mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_partner_visitor WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY visit_dt DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_partner_visitor WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_partner_visitor WHERE deleted = 0 AND CAST(visit_dt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_partner_visitor WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_partner_visitor WHERE deleted = 0 AND YEAR(visit_dt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(visit_dt) = MONTH(GETDATE())
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_partner_visitor (visit_dt, visitor_name, company_name, position, contact, purpose, area, education, ppe, check_in_time, check_out_time, stay_hours, mgr_name, id_number, status, note, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{visitDt}GETDATE(), #{visitorName}, #{companyName}, #{position}, #{contact}, #{purpose}, #{area}, #{education}, #{ppe}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{stayHours}, #{mgrName}, #{idNumber}, #{status}'입장중', #{note}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_partner_visitor SET visit_dt = #{visitDt}, visitor_name = #{visitorName}, company_name = #{companyName}, position = #{position}, contact = #{contact}, purpose = #{purpose}, area = #{area}, education = #{education}, ppe = #{ppe}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, stay_hours = #{stayHours}, mgr_name = #{mgrName}, id_number = #{idNumber}, status = #{status}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_partner_visitor SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
